states.name: Nocteddy
states.title: Nocteddy
states.description: Nocteddies are woodland bears that sometimes travel into the plains when their food sources are threatened. During the Pandemonium, monsters eat up more than their fair share of foods, so Nocteddies go looking wherever they can find a meal.

states.name: Noctursus
states.title: Noctursus
states.description: While not generally known to attack humans, Noctursus will look for food wherever they can get it. On the other hand, this means they will make dedicated, fierce allies if given a reliable food source. Some woodland people even rely on them as hunting companions.
